title: Totem Shu [Arknights]
description: Totem with the character Shu from game Arknights.
body:
# Totem Shu [Arknights]:
This is a **resource pack** that changes the usual texture of the totem to an image of the character **Shu** and also **adds sound** when totem used. The character comes from a popular tactical tower defense mobile game with gacha mechanics **"Arknights"**.

## Info:
- The size of the image itself _(1024x1024)_.
- The sound used is the character phrase "Reap not what's sown by malice." in the Japanese voice acting. _(Japanese CV - Yoshino Nanjo)_

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad511c747e6494bb5ceab24130c0da230753600_0.webp)
